signals.abstract: Scientific workflow systems automate execution -- scheduling, fault tolerance, resource management -- but not the semantic translation that precedes it. Scientists still manually convert research questions into workflow specifications, a task requiring both domain knowledge and i

signals.title: Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models
